_comment: Seed pool of Substack publication domains (29), biased toward conceptually deep 'brainfood' (philosophy, psychology, culture, meaning, literature, creativity, reflective essays) — NOT AI/tech/startup/news-heavy ones. Canonical bare hostnames (no scheme/www); prefer the '<handle>.substack.com' form even for pubs on a custom domain — it reliably serves /feed and the fetcher follows the redirect. EVERY entry here was verified live through fetchPublication (valid Substack feed, real posts). Grow it with `bun run refresh-pool`. Brainfood is also enforced at the ARTICLE level downstream, so a mixed publication still contributes only its deep pieces. Best-effort: a stale entry is skipped gracefully by the fetcher (MG3).
